'''bel-dar-Nolek''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] serving as director of the [[Obroan Institute for Archaeology|Obroan Institute]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] and up into the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The obese man wore custom-tailored suits and walked with a [[Greel wood/Legends|greel wood]] cane. bel-dar-Nolek was an outspoken critic of the [[New Jedi Order]], blaming them for the [[Death/Legends|death]] of the [[Caamasi/Legends|Caamasi]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Elegos A'Kla]].

==Biography==
The director happened to be on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] at the time of the [[First Battle of Obroa-skai]], which caused some to speculate that it was no accident that the director had believed his [[Planet/Legends|world]] was doomed. When he went before the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]], he was blatantly disrespectful towards other worlds, saying that [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] planets could be forfeit, but that "important" worlds such as [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]] should have been better protected. When [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Borsk Fey'lya]] said that no additional forces would be spared to retake Obroa-skai, bel-dar-Nolek said that the Obroan institute would be better off negotiating with the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] themselves.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}
